zh.Shrivenham, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏史利文哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Francklyn於1488年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親Thomas Franklyn30歲，母親Jane Bathurst24歲。她於1509年與John Hinton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1559年在英國波克夏享年71歲，埋葬在英國波克夏史利文哈姆。

zh-hans.Shrivenham, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏史利文哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Francklyn于1488年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲Thomas Franklyn30岁，母亲Jane Bathurst24岁。她于1509年与John Hinton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1559年在英国波克夏享年71岁，埋葬在英国波克夏史利文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Francklyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Franklin
meanings: English: status name from Middle English frankeleyn ‘freeman, freeholder, land-owner of free but not noble birth’ (Anglo-Norman French fraunclein). In general, he was a gentleman ranked above the main body of minor freeholders but below a knight or a member of the nobility.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, such as   Frankel  .

History: The American statesman and scientist Benjamin Franklin (1706–90) was the son of Josiah Franklin, a chandler (dealer in soap and candles), who had emigrated c. 1682 from Ecton, Northamptonshire, to Boston, MA, where his son was born.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Francklyn was born in 1488, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Franklyn, was 30 and her mother, Jane Bathurst, was 24. She married John Hinton in 1509. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1559, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Francklyn est née en 1488, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Franklyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Jane Bathurst, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Hinton en 1509. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1559, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Francklyn 1488 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Franklyn 30 und ihre Mutter Jane Bathurst 24. Sie hat 1509 John Hinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1559 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Berkshire, England und wurde in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Francklyn è nata il nel 1488 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Franklyn, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Jane Bathurst, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Hinton nel 1509. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1559, nel Berkshire, England, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Shrivenham, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Francklynが1488年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Franklynは30歳，母Jane Bathurstは24歳であった。1509年にJohn Hintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1559年にイギリスバークシュアイアで71歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Francklyn(이)가 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Franklyn(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Bathurst(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1509년 John Hinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1559년 영국 버크실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 슈라이븐함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Francklyn nasceu em 1488, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Franklyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Jane Bathurst, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hinton em 1509. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1559, em Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Francklyn родилась в 1488 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Franklyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Bathurst, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hinton в 1509 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1559 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Francklyn nació en 1488, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Franklyn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Jane Bathurst, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Hinton en 1509. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1559, en Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
